dsl_rule.translation_notes: CPR (Central Pivot Range) translated using pivot point system: central pivot line = pivot, lower end of CPR = s1 (first support level). Uptrend condition approximated as close > sma_50. Entry requires price below pivot but above s1 (the corrective dip within CPR). Exit triggers when price breaks below s1 support, confirming trend reversal or failed setup.

backtest_rule.reason: CPR (Central Pivot Range) translated using pivot point system: central pivot line = pivot, lower end of CPR = s1 (first support level). Uptrend condition approximated as close > sma_50. Entry requires price below pivot but above s1 (the corrective dip within CPR). Exit triggers when price breaks below s1 support, confirming trend reversal or failed setup.

source_rule_text: In an uptrend, if price corrects below the central pivot line but sustains above the lower end of the CPR, expect price to move higher.
